english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O He Who is intrinsic though He is evident,
And He Who is evident though He is intrinsic;
O He Who is intrinsic that is not missed
And He Who is evident but He cannot be seen;

arabic text: يَا مَوْصُوفاً لا يَبْلُغُ بِكَيْنُونَتِهِ مَوْصُوفٌ وَلا حَدّ مَحْدُودٌ،
english translation text: O He Who is described, but neither any other described thing nor can any boundary attain His Being;
O He Who is absent but not lost,
And He Who is present but not witnessed.
When He is sought, He shall be obtained,

arabic text: وَلَمْ يَخْلُ مِنْهُ السّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرْضُ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ،
english translation text: And neither the heavens, nor the earth nor can anything that is between them be empty of Him.
He cannot be realized by asking ‘How is He?’
And His place cannot be identified by asking, ‘Where is He?’ or ‘What is His place?’
You are verily the light of all lights and the Lord of all lords.
Glory be to Him Whose like is non-existent,
And He is the All-hearing, the All-seeing.

arabic text: سبحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ هكَذَا وَلا هَكَذَا غَيْرُه!
english translation text: Glory be to Him Who is in this state and nothing else can be ever in his state.
